instruction: I accidentally deleted multiple event assets. Recover only poster_party_night.webp and guest_list.txt from Trash into /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/, and keep old_note.txt in Trash. Also ensure recovered files keep their original content.

parameters.command:
cat > /home/user/Desktop/poster_party_night.webp <<'EOF'
FAKE_WEBP_CONTENT_PARTY_NIGHT_V1
EOF
cat > /home/user/Desktop/guest_list.txt <<'EOF'
Alice
Bob
Charlie
EOF
cat > /home/user/Desktop/old_note.txt <<'EOF'
keep in trash
EOF

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5);

result.command:
ok=1; [ -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/poster_party_night.webp ] || ok=0; [ -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/guest_list.txt ] || ok=0; [ ! -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/old_note.txt ] || ok=0; grep -qx 'FAKE_WEBP_CONTENT_PARTY_NIGHT_V1' /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/poster_party_night.webp || ok=0; diff -u <(printf 'Alice
Bob
Charlie
') /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/guest_list.txt >/dev/null 2>&1 || ok=0; trash_match=$(find /home/user/.local/share/Trash/files -maxdepth 1 -name 'old_note.txt*' | wc -l); [ "$trash_match" -ge 1 ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
